name: Julie Gold
abstract: Julie Gold (born February 3, 1956) is an American singer-songwriter. She is best known for her musical composition "From a Distance," which became a hit for Bette Midler and won a Grammy Award for Song of the Year in 1991.

concerts.label: Nanci Griffith: Other Voices, Other Rooms
Standard Time with Michael Feinstein: Ladies of the Chorus: A Salute to Women Songwriters

about_quotes.speaker: Ruthie Foster
about_quotes.evidence: I found myself in front of great songwriters like Julie Gold who wrote “From a Distance” and really picking their brains when it came to writing songs
about_quotes.doc_title: Ruthie Foster interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, February 28, 2023
